body:
Automate the sales of your mini offers (ebooks, challenges, online courses etc) with Meta ads. 

Grab my easy to follow step-by-step campaign set up to profitably sell low ticket offers (based on the latest algorithm update). 

Comment Ads to access for $67 👇

I didn't think it was possible to make good money selling mini digital offers priced $17-$97...

Mostly because the math didn't seem to math. 

I had built my company through high ticket so it was a big mindset shift. 

And while I love the intimacy and results that come from high ticket programs - after life decided to do life, and I hit a mental rock bottom - I realised I needed an income stream detached from my direct time. 

That's when I started to explore selling one asset, over and over again, at scale. 

First I started with my books. 

Then I added my digital courses. 

Now, I not only know it's possible to be profitable selling low ticket offers with ads - I'm living it! 

Let me show you my own ad account and the step by step campaign set up to be profitable with Meta ads to $17-$97 offers. 

Grab the training here: https://cathowell.com/lticketads

body:
I've been dabbling in low ticket for over five years, selling live workshops or challenges ranging anywhere from $44 to $1200. 

Back then, I was hesitant to run ads - mostly because I still had a lot of residual fear and trauma from running ads for clients as an agency for over a decade. So I sold my workshops organically to my audience and through social media. 

And it worked, BUT, and there’s a big But, it required A LOT of energy to do this. 

The buildup to announcing the workshop, selling it, posting about it, sending gout the emails. 

After a year of this - and as a one man band in my business. this quickly led to burnout. 

It was here that I realised I needed to automate the sales and the best way to do this was thorough ads and an evergreen mini course that could be sold and delivered over and over again at scale, regardless if I’m “on” or not. 

That was in June 2025. 

By September 2025 I was making $500/day from my digital courses (spending about $200/day on ads). 

Last month my business did $80,000 in low ticket sales and spent $30,000 on ads. 
And I didn’t have to live launch, didn’t have to post on social media four times a day, didn’t have to even sell anything high ticket on the back. 

If you're thinking about automating sales to your digital course, here's the good news: 

> it’s never been easier to advertise with Meta ads (you just need to provide it with specific messaging) 

> you can test and validate very quickly with low ticket offers (vs high ticket offers easily require $1-$2K in testing) 

> Meta LOVES mini offers - because the Purchase event gets fired A LOT, and the algorithm loves this. 

Let me show you my own ad account set up and the step by step campaign structure to profitably sell mini offers with ads. 

Grab the training here: https://cathowell.com/lticketads

Your offer sells when you post about it.

When you go live.

But when you stop?

Most coaches and digital product creators fail to scale their digital courses not because the offer sucks, not because people don’t want what they have, but because it relies on their direct time and energy: 

😩 Live launches

😩 Constant posting 

😩 Free challenges 

The moment you stop pushing, sales stop too.

The truth: it doesn’t have to be that way. 

There is a way to sell your mini course around the clock - even while you sleep - without burning out or being glued to your phone.

linkTitle: High ticket burnout made me do it
body:
I thought that if I gave more free content, free workshops, podcast episodes, Substack articles…

Then people would trust me, and my sales would grow.
I thought that in order to hit $3k+ days….

I needed to sell high ticket. 

But I was wrong, on both counts.

The free masterclasses and content burned me out, and did not, infact, increase my sales 

And the high ticket offers required my direct time.

I wanted a business that could sell and deliver without needing me to be plugged in 24/7

Without having to live launch or give freebies away every month

And so four months ago I did something wild.

And shifted my front end to low ticket ecosystem made up of $17-$97 offers.

And I changed my entire content strategy.

The result? 👀

$10K week ALL from low ticket offers 🤯

Stripe notifications while I sleep 

Customers purchasing and binging on all my offers 

I still have some private clients and a high ticket group BUT I am no longer financially dependant on these. My low ticket system is profitable frontend and sells around the clock. 

Grab the training on how to build your own low ticket ecosystem that feels like peace: https://cathowell.com/orderltocodex

I’m releasing my first ads training in over six years! 😮‍💨 

On how to build and scale profitable ads to $17-$97 offers.

Ideal if you’re looking to automate your own low ticket sales or work with clients.

Inside I’ll reveal my own account set up - which is super low maintenance and doesn’t require you to be a FB ad master (although if you’re following me you probably are 😉

Comment ADS and I’ll send you the link or click here to access: https://cathowell.com/orderltoads

linkTitle: Run ads to mini offers • Only $67
body:
My client was spending $300+ for a booked sales call for his high ticket offer!

Only to be ghosted by the leads half the time.

So in June we built out a low ticket ecosystem to fill up his high ticket backend.

Initially he had a lot of objections, his mains one being:

"Low ticket buyers aren't gonna to be the right quality - they aren't going to spend $10K"

"Won't a low ticket front end confuse my pixel?"

By that stage, I had already built two seven figure brands through low ticket workshops that would sell my high ticket backend offers without sales calls, and so - although skeptical - he decided to trust me.

Fast forward to today.

He is getting PAID to bring in new customers into his business!

The best part: the leads ARE booking in calls with him and they ARE GREAT QUALITY - they show up, they trust, they don't need to "think about it", and they BUY (yes even at a $10K price range).

The secret to making it all work on autopilot WITHOUT having to live launch or constantly post on social media is: ads! 

Let me show you the step by step campaign set up to running profitable ads to low ticket offers based on the latest algorithm update (and without needing to be a Facebook ad ninja). 

Access here for only $67: https://cathowell.com/lticketads
